# Zotero Upstream Deep-Verification Report

## Summary

4 contracts verified, all hold. Broke-on-release: 0. Broke-on-beta: 0. Broke-on-dev: 0. All four watch targets (`collection-tree-render-item`, `collection-tree-row-duplicates-search-object`, `item-save-data`, `merge-items`) satisfy their behavioral contracts on release (9.0.5), beta (9.0), and dev (main).

## Release-affecting (act now)

None. No contracts broke on release (9.0.5) or beta (9.0). On beta, every target was confirmed byte-identical to release (`collectionTree.jsx`, `collectionTreeRow.js`, `item.js` _saveData region, and `mergeItems.mjs` all IDENTICAL to 9.0.5).

## Dev radar (track only)

No contract broke on main. All four targets still hold on dev, but the following additive, non-breaking refactors were observed on `main` and should be tracked (product code must NOT change for these — they are informational only):

- **collection-tree-render-item** (`collectionTree.jsx@main`, 105770 bytes): extra div class toggles (`first-selected`/`last-selected`/`focused`) and removal of the `index >= _rows.length` early-return guard. Neither alters the `span.cell.label.primary` / `span.cell-text` DOM or the appended badge. No relocation of contract logic.
- **collection-tree-row-duplicates-search-object** (`collectionTreeRow.js@40cb1cf`, 692 lines): caching relocated from the global `Zotero.CollectionTreeCache` to a per-instance cache (`_cachedSearch`/`_cachedResults`/`_cachedTempTable`, constructor lines 50-52; `getSearchObject` early-return lines 407-409; new `clearCache()` lines 603-616 dropping `_cachedTempTable` via a DB commit callback). The `onUnload` temp-table DROP is now nested under an `if (!options.unfiltered)` guard (lines 430-443). Additive — the lifecycle Zoplicate compensates for is intact.
- **item-save-data** (`item.js@40cb1cf`, version 10.0.SOURCE): `_saveData` relocated to line 1615; an `env.undoData` accessDate-snapshot block was added inside the itemData loop. Touches no watched contract (notifierData forwarding, `_changed` reads, parentID/parentKey aliases all unchanged).
- **merge-items** (`mergeItems.mjs@40cb1cf`): additive `Zotero.UndoHistory.stageAction('undo-action-merge-items', { count: otherItems.length + 1 })` at the top of the `executeTransaction` callback (lines 7-10). Exported `mergeItems(item, otherItems)` signature and all merge side effects unchanged.

## Proposed watchlist additions

None. No `suggested_new_target` stubs proposed — no contract relocated out of its watched anchor, so existing watch targets remain sufficient. The new dev-only surfaces (per-instance cache `clearCache()`, `env.undoData` snapshot, `Zotero.UndoHistory.stageAction`) are additive and do not yet warrant dedicated contracts; revisit if they reach beta and intersect a Zoplicate contract.

## Recommended next step

update watchlist + re-run check, no product change
